---
title: "final-report"
author: "Stella Pham 1011437688"
date: "2026-03-20"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

# This is a not a title
# STAA57 IS GREAT

```{r eval = FALSE}
library(tidyverse)
```

```{r}
d = read.csv("data/fueltypesall.csv")
d = na.omit(d)
glimpse(d)
```
